    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <title>手厅</title>

<body>
<pre><code id = "code" style="word-wrap:break-word" class="html" source="">
   
</code></pre>
<script>
    var code = document.getElementById("code")
    var source = code.getAttribute("source")
    code.removeAttribute("source")
    var element = document.createTextNode(decodeURIComponent(atob(source)))
    code.appendChild(element)
    hljs.highlightBlock(code);
    </script>
</body>
</html>
